case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. SAMY GWINN LANGDON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF COPIES MADE AS BUSINESS RECORD ( EVID CODE 1521, 1550 ) . FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $375.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LANGDON, SAMY GWINN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA ULTIMATE AUTO SALES
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT ( EQUIPMENT VALUATION ) . FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED FEB-24-2006, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LANGDON, SAMY GWINN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA ULTIMATE AUTO SALES
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANGDON, SAMY GWINN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA ULTIMATE AUTO SALES POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: 1 DRYAIRE MEMBRANE DRYING SYSTEM; 1 CHAMP CALIBRATED TRAM GAUGE ;, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $11,902.12 DAMAGES, $1,525.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $375.00 COSTS, $88.02 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,890.14, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH RE LEASE EQUIPMENT ( VALUE OF PROPERTY $ 4,000.00 ) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
